title: Solloway, Amanda - Government Whip - ACOBA Advice
body: "Ms Solloway left her role at the Whip’s Office in July 2024.  Director, HeadHigh CIC Ms Solloway sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with HeadHigh CIC. The letter containing the Committee’s advice about the conditions imposed was sent in September 2024; and was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
